items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time availability sync to Google.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the real-time availability sync to Google, but there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms this functionality has been implemented or is operational. The linked use case mentions the need for this sync, yet lacks specific evidence of its status or successful execution. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
